creator: georg-bsd@schorsch-tech.de
text:
Created attachment 200276
Screenshot "See your local kernel hacker"

I got an AMD Radeon Pitcarain GPU. It runs smoothly on 11.2-RELEASE with dual monitor. As i upgraded to freebsd 12.0-RELEASE it shows just one monitor. As i read on the notes that there is amdgpu driver for newer cards HD7000+. 

The radeonkms driver on 12.0 just activates one screen instead of both screens as on 11.2-RELEASE.

I took this screenshot (as i dont have a local kernel hacker)
